narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 2-E (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,041 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
